A New Standard of
Crystal Clear Water

Laboratory-grade chemistry meets white-glove service. Serving Austin, TX and the Hill Country with excellence.

Get a Free Assessment

Licensed Professional
Fully Insured
Bonded Service
15+ Years Experience
Locally Owned & Operated

Our Philosophy

We believe your pool should be
effortlessly pristine — not a weekend project.

Aqua Clear was founded on a simple premise: pool ownership should feel like a vacation, not a chore. We combine advanced water chemistry with meticulous attention to detail to ensure your pool is always ready for you, your family, and your guests.

98%

Customer Retention Rate over our 15 years in business.

The Science of
Perfect Chemistry

Clear water isn't just about adding chlorine. It's a delicate balance of pH, alkalinity, calcium hardness, and cyanuric acid. Our certified technicians use laboratory-grade testing equipment to prescribe the exact treatment your specific pool needs.

The result? Water that doesn't just look clean, but feels soft on the skin, doesn't burn the eyes, and protects your expensive pool equipment from corrosion and scaling.

What We Do

Comprehensive Care

06 Specialized Services
01

Weekly Maintenance

Comprehensive cleaning, skimming, brushing, and vacuuming to keep your pool pristine week after week.

02

Chemical Balancing

Precise laboratory-grade testing and chemical adjustment for safe, crystal-clear, and comfortable water.

03

Equipment Service

Inspection, maintenance, and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and salt cells to ensure optimal performance.

04

Deep Cleaning

Intensive restorative cleaning for neglected pools, turning green water back to sparkling blue.

05

Opening & Closing

Professional seasonal preparation to protect your investment during winter and ready it for summer.

06

Preventative Care

Proactive treatments to prevent algae blooms, scaling, and staining before they become costly problems.

Simple, Transparent Pricing

Choose Your Level of Care

Essential

Perfect for screened-in pools requiring basic chemical maintenance.

$149per month
  • Bi-weekly water testing & balancing
  • Empty skimmer & pump baskets
  • Filter backwashing as needed
  • Visual equipment inspection
  • Basic chemical supplies included
Select Plan
Most Popular

Professional

Our most comprehensive weekly service for pristine year-round swimming.

$229per month
  • Weekly water testing & balancing
  • Full surface skimming & netting
  • Wall & step brushing
  • Bottom vacuuming
  • Empty all baskets & cleaners
  • Filter cleaning & backwashing
  • All premium chemicals included
Select Plan

Premium

White-glove service for large, complex, or heavily used luxury pools.

$349per month
  • Twice-weekly visits
  • Everything in Professional plan
  • Salt cell cleaning (quarterly)
  • Filter cartridge replacement labor
  • Priority storm cleanup response
  • Annual equipment tune-up
  • 24/7 emergency support line
Select Plan

What Our Customers Say

Trust Earned, Pool by Pool

"We struggled with algae for months. Aqua Clear had it crystal clear in 48 hours. Their technicians are incredibly professional and explain everything they do."

Michael Osei

West Lake Hills

"The most reliable service we've ever used. They show up exactly when they say they will, and my pool has never looked better. Worth every penny."

Sarah Jenkins

Barton Creek

"I love getting the detailed report after every visit. It gives me peace of mind knowing exactly what chemicals were added and that the water is safe for my kids."

David Chen

Lakeway

The Process

How It Works

01

Book Online

Fill out our quick form or call us to schedule your free initial assessment.

02

We Assess

A certified technician evaluates your pool's chemistry, equipment, and needs.

03

We Clean

We perform the necessary treatments and establish a maintenance routine.

04

You Swim

Enjoy a consistently pristine pool without lifting a finger.

We Serve Your
Neighbourhood

Our technicians are strategically routed to ensure prompt, reliable service across Austin and the Hill Country. Based in the heart of the city, we're never too far to keep your pool crystal clear.

Downtown Austin
West Lake Hills
Barton Creek
Cedar Park
Round Rock
Lakeway
Bee Cave
Pflugerville

Our Standard

"When we first moved to Austin, we realized maintaining a home is difficult. We're here to help make pool ownership effortless."
